iotfleetwise.signalcatalog.node.CfnAbout: A general abstraction of a signal. A node can be specified as an actuator, attribute, branch, or sensor.

iotfleetwise.signalcatalog.node.Actuator.Description: (Optional) Information about a node specified as an actuator.  An actuator is a digital representation of a vehicle device.

iotfleetwise.signalcatalog.node.Attribut.Description: (Optional) Information about a node specified as an attribute.  An attribute represents static information about a vehicle.

iotfleetwise.signalcatalog.node.Branch.Description: (Optional) Information about a node specified as a branch.  A group of signals that are defined in a hierarchical structure.

iotfleetwise.signalcatalog.node.Sensor.Description: (Optional) An input component that reports the environmental condition of a vehicle.  You can collect data about fluid levels, temperatures, vibrations, or battery voltage from sensors.
